name: tract_id
description: Census tract GEOID; source: Census TIGER/Line

name: median_income
description: Median household income; source: Census API ACS 5-year estimate variable B19013

name: zero_vehicle_pct
description: Percentage of households with zero vehicles; source: Census API ACS 5-year estimate variable B08201

name: housing_cost_burden_pct
description: Percentage of households spending more than 30% of income on housing; source: Census API ACS 5-year estimate variable B25070

name: interborough_commute_pct
description: Percentage of workers commuting outside Queens; used for Category 5 inter-borough connectivity recommendations; source: Census API ACS 5-year estimate variable B08301

name: transit_dependent
description: Derived flag; true when zero_vehicle_pct is elevated AND median_income < 80% NYC AMI AND housing_cost_burden_pct > 30%; thresholds from affordable housing policy literature; derived in src/equity.py

name: geometry
description: Tract polygon geometry in WGS84; used for spatial join onto stop locations; source: Census TIGER/Line
